title: David Fifita (rugby league, born 2000)
extract: David Tuiono Fifita (born 25 February 2000) is a professional rugby league footballer who plays as a second-rower for the South Sydney Rabbitohs in the National Rugby League (NRL). He previously played for the Brisbane Broncos and the Gold Coast Titans in the NRL and has played for the Indigenous All Stars, Queensland, the Prime Minister's XIII and the Tonga national rugby league team.
